book.destination: restaurant that the user will book
book.departure: accommodation that the user will book

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the moderate price range and doesn't need to have free parking
The hotel should include free wifi and should be in the east
Once you find the hotel you want to book it for 8 people and 2 nights starting from thursday
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should be in the same price range as the hotel and should be in the same area as the hotel
The restaurant should serve italian food
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for the same group of people at 14:45 on the same day
Make sure you get the reference number
You also want to book a taxi to commute between the two places
You want to make sure it arrives the restaurant by the booked time
Make sure you get contact number and car type
